title: Farmland
description: A modpack built for SMP servers, especially public ones. [ABANDONED]
body:
# Farmland
**Why archived?** It keeps crashing my OS and I can't figure out why and I don't really want to work on it  
Farmland is a modpack built for SMP servers, especially public ones
  
## Features  
### Quality of life  
* Controller support
 * In game screenshot viewing
* Adjustable zoom
* 4K screenshots
* Player heads in chat
* Container animations
* Better statistics screen
* Spotify control
* Eating animation
* Tells you how much saturation you have
* Tells you how much hunger and saturation a food is going to give you
* Dynamic lights
* Better footstep sounds
### Performance
* Faster lighting engine (Starlight)
* Faster rendering engine (Sodium)
* Iris shaders
* Better sodium options screen
* Good-Looking leaf culling

## Disclaimers
You need to press F9 to take 4K screenshots, F2 takes normal screenshots  
If you want to use the essential mod, you should disable the Screenshot Viewer mod since essential has screenshot viewing built in
